title: machinery-configmap chart
_comment: additionalProperties left open so the catalog verifier (call-argocd-verify-catalog) can inject its common probe values like `destination` without tripping the schema. The chart only consumes `name` and `content`; anything else is ignored.

name.description: ConfigMap name. Must match the volume name the Deployment patch in apps/machinery/install mounts.

content.description: Full machinery config.json content as a string.
